name: Cat Kids' Sleeping Bag - Pillowfort™
description: They'll enjoy camping outdoors with this Cat Sleeping Bag from Pillowfort™. Made from soft fabric with ample filling to keep them nice and snug, this rectangular sleeping bag features a pink and white checkered pattern and an attached cat pillow for a cute look. The sleeping bag is designed to fit kids up to 57 inches tall and is easy to pack for convenient carrying.
